# Aaron's Koshe

> Aaron's Koshe is a cafe & restaurant at 94 Campbell Parade, Bondi Beach NSW 2026, Australia — directly opposite Bondi Beach in Sydney. It serves specialty single-origin coffee, all-day breakfast, fresh brunch and lunch plates, smoothies and juices, house-baked pastries, and evening cocktails at the bar.

Key facts:
- Cuisine: Cafe (specialty coffee, all-day breakfast, brunch & lunch, pastries), cocktail bar
- Address: 94 Campbell Parade, Bondi Beach NSW 2026, Australia
- Phone: +61 2 9365 1234
- Hours: Open daily 5:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Kitchen until 3:00 PM · Bar from 5:00 PM
- Price range: $$ (coffee from A$4.50, breakfast from A$16, brunch from A$22)
- Reservations: online via Quandoo or by phone; walk-ins welcome
- Delivery: Uber Eats, DoorDash, Hungry Panda
- Signature items: Flat White on single-origin espresso, Big Bondi Breakfast, Smashed Avo & Feta, Acai Bowl, 18-hour Cold Brew, Espresso Martini
- Dietary: vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free options across the menu; oat, almond, soy and macadamia milk available

## Pages

- [Home](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/): Overview of the cafe, signature dishes and reservations
- [Full Menu](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/menu.html): Complete menu with prices — coffee, breakfast, brunch, smoothies, pastries, cocktails
- [Specialty Coffee](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/coffee.html): Coffee menu, brewing method and FAQs
- [Breakfast & Brunch](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/breakfast.html): All-day breakfast and brunch menus with FAQs
- [Drinks & Cocktails](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/drinks.html): Smoothies, juices, cocktails and bar FAQs
- [About](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/about.html): The story and philosophy of Aaron's Koshe
- [Blog](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/blog.html): Guides to specialty coffee, breakfast and cafe culture in Bondi
- [Contact & Reservations](https://aaronskoshe.com.au/contact.html): Booking, opening hours, map and contact details
